user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Wendy S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_RG5etSOb9kZnaMS0tlpWbuoPvYCTd_hRiVuBxGwrR81wbD5DkA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"LOOK NO FURTHER – go with JMT Roofing!

Here’s why:

- The owner, John, is honest, compassionate, and takes real pride in the quality of his workmanship.

- He treats his team with respect, and you can see that motivation reflected in the great work they do.

- Before giving a quote, John personally inspects your roof—unlike salespeople who rely only on satellite images and miss important details.

- His pricing is fair, and he uses top-quality shingles, underlay, and materials.

- He doesn’t cut corners—he replaces all old metal instead of re-using it.

- He even adds extra roof vents (without you having to ask), showing his commitment to doing the job right.

- Communication is excellent—you get daily updates with photos so you always know what’s happening.

- Cleanup is thorough and leaves no mess behind.

- Best of all, the warranty is transferable to a future homeowner if you ever sell your house.

I learned the hard way that not all roofers are the same. A couple of years ago, I used a large roofing company, Penxxxxx, and was completely disappointed. When I reported issues afterward, the salesman who sold me the job passed me off to the repair department and never spoke to me again (and the repairs were not done up to standard).  With JMT Roofing, the experience was the exact opposite—personal, professional, and trustworthy from start to finish.

Did I not say it all here? If you want peace of mind and a roof done right—JMT Roofing is the one to call!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCj4zUNTMC4SxUYck3Vz6LF&fid=0x0:0xfe397a6c07238486"],"When":"2025-9-13"},{"Name":"David Pickrell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxlva0pjrofzJ-R3DN9bTPs_tJ2cuMqpOUfzOom8Vltp1dY6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quality workmanship highlighted by superb customer service.  John and his team have been doing this for a long while.  His turnover on his team is low because he recognizes having engaged, good people on a job make everyone happier.

Our roof was done on time and on budget and I have to say that his team was very friendly and made certain that they left the jobsite clean every day.

As the job progressed we got regular pictures of the progress.  John would inform us what steps were next so we always knew what was happening on our roof.

I take great efforts to research companies who work on my home and JMT was an excellent choice and I can recommend them without hesitation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEMqZtIaLycKxEQ&fid=0x0:0xfe397a6c07238486"],"When":"2025-6-4"},{"Name":"Dave Ballance","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYX6nq_HLwpfRDMsBw6lLqPrWnr9cBkodLmufnMfPWG9e9gYI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"JMT roofing is awesome, reliable and reasonably priced.

I noticed moisture in my attic and contacted JMT. Within an hour, John had someone check it out and I had a quote for a new roof within days. Two weeks later I had a new roof for a great price.

Staff were friendly and the workmanship was top notch. John uses the best materials available and stands behind his work.

John checked in daily during the install and they sent me photos of the work progress everyday.

John noticed my front facia boards to my peaks were rotten and he not only replaced them, he gave me time to paint them before they went up. They also noticed my bathroom vents were not vented properly and they helped me remedy this issue quickly and at no new cost.

I can’t say anough about JMT and John. You won’t find a better roofing company.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIzLKnmwE&fid=0x0:0xfe397a6c07238486"],"When":"2025-3-30"},{"Name":"Mike Personal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKI3Qr7P4_bbomeZmaC9BytjxAjgmbGYRDjvnUhMLXKfMD7Ww=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This summer we replaced our cedar shake roof with asphalt along with all our gutters and had the pleasure of working with John and his crews. The quote John provided was reasonable, and he thoroughly outlined all the work to be done and materials required. He was responsive to our questions and sent pictures daily showing the roofing crew's progress. Both crews were professional, hard working and efficient. The windows and deck skylight were protected throughout the projects and the site was cleaned at the end of each day. Both crews did an exceptional job. We are extremely happy with the final projects and would highly recommend JMT!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Olivia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJsiz5MRV_dSdQeILy_z6RQ_elNqAqS26rLwiyhhoNMv-Tzgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"John and his team were amazing to deal with. Their customer service was top notch! They were quick to get back to us, well priced, came in on budget. The work was done on time and they left the job site clean everyday. They even updated us with pictures of the progress and were available for any questions we has. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDgn_uSDA&fid=0x0:0xfe397a6c07238486"],"When":"2025-2-28"},{"Name":"Faiyaz Ali","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtG5Q2-GIilfeYrKPvPns10ELU5SXUgwpFsV0AchxJz1XguELY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"JMT roofing experience was above and beyond what we expected. The quality work, great communication, professional service is second to none. Would not hesitate to recommend them, all staff and processes were excellent and we're confident we got excellent value for our money. The care they put into making sure every detail was taken care of from start to finish is commendable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJDMkvL34L_eSA&fid=0x0:0xfe397a6c07238486"],"When":"2025-5-14"},{"Name":"Why Bee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFuhV9kyfG7eazUty3FPOoCLo-8gi1gQEQp9VqXvROR7uA3Zk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I looked at different roofing companies to replace my roof as there was a leak and it needed to be replaced as it was over 30 years old.  I chose John and JMT roofing because I liked his honesty of what his service provides and answered all my initial questions.  His price may have cost a bit more but it was well worth it as he has his own team and does not sub-contract.  He also got his team to come out and patch the leak immediately free of charge while I waited for his team to come out at a later date to replace my roof.  His team takes pictures at the end of each day to show progress and any questions or concerns would be answered almost immediately by a phone call or text.  I'll be recommending his service to my friends for sure.

-Terence","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amy Ng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHfXKkjMuIjiZqAH5i9e5tASZ4v35dX5StjHV2yX-D5qkCB20=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had my house roof replaced last month and was very impressed with the whole experience. Communication with John was excellent and reliable. His crew was friendly, polite, and always patient in answering my questions. At the end of each day, they sent me photos showing the progress, which I really appreciated. They worked tidily and carefully cleaned up my yard for debris and nails. The price was reasonable, the job was completed on schedule, and the workmanship is excellent. I’ve already received many compliments from my neighbours on how great the roof looks. Highly recommended!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Gary addressed all my questions and concerns with professionalism and patience. You can tell he works with integrity and genuinely wants to do the best by his clients. [{"Name":"Olga A.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-nzsMRQBwDglYKxPa0gc7-yZiZsq6ZI_IPaLyV4t0VoekBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Many years ago, we had our roof installed by Interlock Roofing Company, which came with a lifetime warranty. The roof served us well, but over the last couple of years the paint began to peel and it became quite unsightly. We contacted Interlock to request a replacement. I have to admit, it took some time and a few follow-up emails and phone calls, but eventually our case was passed to Todd — and thanks to him, our problem was fully resolved.
Todd arranged for the best installer, Danny, to handle our roof, and I don’t have enough words to describe how exceptional he is. Not only is Danny extremely knowledgeable and professional, but he is also a true perfectionist who pays attention to every detail. Our roof looks beautiful again thanks to both Todd and Danny.
We truly appreciate their dedication and the quality of their work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Izuka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLBJthSsWg9EtR7rCCCUj0moZ7ck_z-_a6Sp8g5sCCsyKR7nA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I debated for some time as whether or not to replace our aging roof with a metal roof or go with the standard asphalt shingles. We highly recommend this company!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo_L2h-AE&fid=0x0:0x33603de0ccfe3ecd"],"When":"2025-4-23"},{"Name":"Kenneth Leung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKYHVgTkUVe5XJcvBq-H8zVU4p_Sd-D0g3_NJKYAc4sL-iqzw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Extremely satisfied with the whole process. The initial visit by the sale representative shows they have done their research on my roof and what will be required. They started work exactly when they said they would. Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob Cunningham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRdJyAKQzk3cJBUNO_cN6XdNEQMWpM-UeCc5rEZLnjWTrvNJLi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the time I made the decision, to select Interlock as the successful roofing company, I have been extremely  satisfied.  The customer service has need excellent, regardless of whether it was administration, schedulers or the sale representative.

The 4-5 man crew worked hard and long hours, under very hot conditions.  Under the supervision of Antonio, a man with extensive experience and thoroughness, the project advanced quickly. One thing that demonstrated this was the focus on keeping the site clean and free of materials and nails and fasteners.

Upon completion, my neighbours were echoing my own observation; if a roof could be beautiful, this one met that standard.  People walking the public trail, have stopped to take pictures, and ask questions.

👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Axiana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqj3YTC5yDIlMxFeAf2d34mGsnjatPg0jVpv457fFRfp335NCW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I bought a house with an interlock roof installed, it was a huge selling point of the house, unfotunately the seller did not tell me (possibly they did not know) that the warranty needed to be transfered (I mean seriously, the roof was installed on the house, not their backs), my "life time" roof started leaking, I contacted Interlock for assistance and they asked me if I transfered the warranty within 60 days, and I advised them that I had no idea that I had to. I told them that I would be willing to pay the transfer fee. And they refused. The reason you ask.... Because they cannot prove that I did not modify the roof. Seriouly! So I asked, how could you prove that the original owner did not modify the roof if you do not come out to inspect it, they had no answer for this.

They use a loophole not to back their product that they swear is a lifetime product!

Do not buy Interlock, it is way over priced. I am now installing shingles that have a 50 year Labor and Product warranty that is warrantied to the RESIDENT not the Owner! They are called Mystique shingles and are produced in Alberta, I am certain any roofer in the Canada can obtain them, and they are beautiful!

*In response to the owner below, the product warranty is by Interlock brand not the installer so it does not matter where it was installed, the product itself is horrible. The roofer below may be wonderful, but the product Interlock itself is garbage. But just to clarify, this owner did nothing wrong. My home is in Alberta, it is the Interlock Company themselves that I have a problem with*","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ8fuGcQ&fid=0x0:0x33603de0ccfe3ecd"],"When":"2023-6-29"},{"Name":"Paul Liversidge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFGDkvyDENScd31cVlAybdX3ll9PQ3gLVtsQEUcoCAdU7DG2sL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had the black shingle installed. It's a great finish, very clean and smooth, modern, and a vast improvement over the old cedar roof with curled shingles and other broken pieces. The installation guys toiled through some long hot days, even working on Saturday to keep the job on time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICqn-XuLA&fid=0x0:0x33603de0ccfe3ecd"],"When":"2021-6-23"},{"Name":"Marianna Makara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLU0VUUVZPhi_1yrhLlrMmHLtD7zXHTHYCPcfitQtTX25E_dw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"19 years ago we had Interlock install a Mediterranean styled metal roof to replace an aging cedar shake roof and it has been performing great.  Last year we covered 2 of our sun decks with tempered glass structures and found that sliding snow posed a danger of breaking the glass and causing costly repairs.  We chose Interlock to install snow rails, not just in the areas prone to sliding snow causing damage, but on all other sections where sliding snow could injure anyone walking on the surrounding paved walkways.  The Interlock installer, Tariq, installed the snow rails this past fall just in time to prevent snow from crashing on our glass sun deck covers and also prevent snow from crashing on cars parked just in front of our garages.
Tariq performed the install efficiently and was pleasant to deal with.  Well done!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDmtfPpmwE&fid=0x0:0x33603de0ccfe3ecd"],"When":"2022-2-4"},{"Name":"Guillermo Schwarz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6IG6Fg400TbW1Sf4QbXuJI65ymmtxLbPWDPF-2F3RBONKVg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After months of extensive research and due diligence, I chose Interlock to install my new roof. I have no doubts that I made the best decision, as now I have the best product in the market with lifetime warranty, fairly priced, installed by the best and with an unbeatable curb appeal... period.
The competitors (not really competitors) do not come even close with product offerings, price and most importantly, seriousness, which I consider essential in a project of this magnitude. The whole process was very smooth and professional, from the first contact with the sales team member, then with the technical consultant that showed  great interest and patience to answer all my questions during several sessions. He also shared photos of their training facility, provided very detailed information about the techniques, the materials and the various proprietary flashing profiles they use in their roof installations.
The installation crew was very professional, clean, respectful and needless to say, very qualified, extremely meticulous and careful. At the end of every single day, they cleaned up everything without leaving any mess behind, as if the lived here. My wife and I were very pleased with that, as they really made an effort to minimize disruptions.
I can confidently recommend Interlock with my eyes closed, especially after researching and talking to ten other roofing companies. Nobody comes close.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDq2PjTngE&fid=0x0:0x33603de0ccfe3ecd"],"When":"2021-6-27"}]

[{"Name":"Pia Dargani Brien","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjbCPmWbpYKVRO8BiMKpOG_Dxwnm8E-XDooFcsmK8EJ7z3hPxoCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Don't think twice - work with Greg! As a new homeowner, I have very little experience and knowledge about repairs and maintenance. I needed to get some roof work done which a lot of roofing companies were declining. Greg responded to my quote right away and while he declined the job as well, he was very helpful in pointing me in the right direction to get the work done. It is clear he knows his stuff and is patient and helpful - even if he wasn't going to get anything out of it. If he would have accepted the job, I would have loved to have him work on my roof. I'll say it again - Work with Greg!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sherry Chan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI07g1GJrS7xM3ou2RKlvvvYErppqpaYJhLMLIac4HgxIfYQA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Greg has come for roof repairs to our concrete tile roof multiple times since 2017 for different unrelated leaks/concerns. He also replaced a leaky skylight for us in 2021. The new skylight, which is solar powered and opens easily, has been a joy have in place  because it cools down the house very well on the hottest summer days. All the work done was prompt and his advice was always thorough and detailed. He always send lots of photos so you know exactly what he worked on and why. I highly recommend them. (I'm not sure if I should mention that I had a few other roofing companies look at our roof back in 2020 - and they all told me my concrete tile roof was way too old at 35 years old, and definitely needed replacing in max 1 or 2 years. Well, that's not what Greg told me... and a few repairs later, it's been 5+ years and the roof is still great. No major issues. I will let you decide who may have been the more honest professional.)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Justin Chan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoRy6fYwiJbdTt9gY7d6D88WPNomM-oPWMBfJSDuQyAwZY8IXI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Greg is an outstanding roofer who not only has the patience to explain his repair philosophy and process but also encourages you to become a better homeowner by bringing awareness to known issues and teaching you to follow responsible maintenance routines. He is honest and transparent and follows a procedural methodology that is cost-efficient and practical, making sure to apply an appropriate level of service for the repair on hand.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLBjXa1JfftesfEVvMHpEIeVC4n0RciISA5HnZDGlnxkSoTIA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently engaged Crucial Roofing to replace our aging skylights, and the experience was exceptional from start to finish. Greg demonstrated outstanding professionalism, promptly addressing all my inquiries via email with patience and clarity, reflecting exemplary customer service.

The installation, executed by Greg and Randy, was remarkably efficient. Their ability to navigate the roof with confidence while handling the skylight showcased their expertise, honed over 20 years in the industry as I was told. Their skill and precision were truly impressive.

What sets Crucial Roofing apart is their integrity. Greg and Randy advised that one of our skylights, a step system, required no replacement, saving us from unnecessary expenses. This honesty, coupled with their transparency, aligns with the positive reviews that led us to choose Crucial Roofing over other contractors known for recommending unneeded repairs. The crew was on time, worked quickly and kept the area around our home clean at all times. Thank you Alliston and crew for your professionalism and excellent workmanship.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEI-G9fSe9JOebQ&fid=0x0:0xd34d14bf4657cd8d"],"When":"2025-5-6"},{"Name":"Paulo Fernandes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXh-CQFx-LBm3jCYIPqxcLHo4DtoZR3dWN4rxbehKLNAP52byma=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience with Alliston and Josh of Ray Browne Roofing!

Ray Browne was recommended to me by a neighbour and a few friends who have used them for their homes previously and I've since recommended Ray Browne to 2 other neighbours since my roof was installed a couple weeks ago.

I had a few roofing companies come to quote, but overall Ray Browne stood out.

Alliston and Josh have been roofers for 25+ years and their experience and skill was obvious.

Alliston carefully and patiently inspected and advised on all of my concerns including a leak I was having with my old roof, condensation issues, and other details.  He didn’t rush through our walkthrough of the roof top, inspection of the attic, including some condensation on a cold December day on the underside of the north facing section of the roof, or any answers to follow up questions I called about after receiving his quote.

Alliston provided a very competitive and detailed quote, including a few upgrade options if I so desired.  He guided us on what we needed and didn't need.  To resolve the condensation issue, additional larger outlet vents at the ridge were installed to increase airflow in my attic.  My continuous strip, full perimeter soffit inlet venting was measured and deemed sufficient.  I agreed to a 3/8” plywood overlay to address the deficiencies of my original shiplap roof deck that caused a leak in my old roof, to ensure a solid installation of the new shingles.

Alliston recommended Certainteed Landmark Moire Black and I opted for the high profile “Mountain Ridge” caps upgrade.  I also opted for an upgraded underlayment of Winterguard along the eaves and DiamondDeck for the rest of the roof surface.  These underlayment and installation options then qualified for Certainteed’s SureStart Plus 5-Star extended warranty which I additionally requested for my own peace of mind.  He understood my concerns and took care and the time to ensure they were all addressed.

He and his 3 man team started first thing in the morning to efficiently remove and carefully and skillfully install a new shingle roof within 2 days, cleaning the job site as they went and ensuring it was clean and clear of debris at the end of the first day as well as at the end of the job on the 2nd day.  I had all the information beforehand and no surprises during the job. Nice and straightforward.

Roofing a house is a significant expense and it was great to see the great care taken to ensure I was satisfied, and I am.

Thank you, Alliston and Josh!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christian Injates","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKukfVhtL1CPsSNwY8BLy_4A46xdFpprbM4BtwIxtfe4Jyd3g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ray Browne Roofing replaced our nearly 30 year old roof recently. This was a cedar to asphalt conversion. The quote was well detailed and everything was explained in detail. When it came to the installation, we were away on vacation but were provided regular updates with photos which was fantastic. The quality of work and cleanup was excellent. I would highly recommend Ray Browne Roofing to anyone wanting quality work for a fair price. We are very happy customers!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICr2ZeQnAE&fid=0x0:0xd34d14bf4657cd8d"],"When":"2024-7-9"},{"Name":"Casey Leung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxu0ds2xd11UxPtjZVDr8DmjwcJULi8pdiC-CtuxL5jalH0RGY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Alliston was great to work with. From the very beginning, Mike (the owner) went out of his way to ensure I felt confident in both the company and the product choices. When I was still deciding which contractor to go with and which shingle color would suit my home best (since small samples don’t always reflect how a full roof will look), Mike provided addresses of past projects so I could see the colors installed on actual homes. This made a huge difference in choosing the perfect look for my roof. We went with MaxDef Granite Gray.

The crew was outstanding. They were respectful, professional, and took great care both in the installation and in cleaning up the property afterwards. Everything was done with attention to detail, and it shows in the final result.

After the job was complete, I raised a concern about the wall flashing color not blending well with the new shingles. Mike personally came out to my home, immediately agreed it didn’t look right, and on the spot painted the flashing so everything looked clean and uniform. That level of responsiveness and commitment to customer satisfaction is rare — and deeply appreciated.

All of my dealings with Mike and his team have been positive. They stand behind their work, deliver excellent quality, and truly care about their customers. I would recommend Busy Boys Roofing to anyone looking for a reliable, trustworthy roofing company.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDJFpUVy_qYQq5z6CdZbM1d&fid=0x0:0x593cb3c2a24977ac"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"Shawn Bremner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJoFJqkGrnTNdaoqJOsGzYbImiHfZz5i6Hjnc_Eb3k9G0nl5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A big shout out to Mike of Busy Boy Roofing for the exceptional service on our replacement roof. They were also so supportive of my daycare and the outside grounds kept safe and clean at all times. I would give a reference any time for this roofing company as our home looks stunning!
Mike also came back and spent the time making sure my sky lights were clean and streak free. Thankyou again in restoring my faith in renovations.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC2UXj3gkral-P6rkyXkw6e&fid=0x0:0x593cb3c2a24977ac"],"When":"2025-9-10"},{"Name":"George & Diana Jubenvill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJF5LEwTWXKXEjUuKzpxWVjKKE6C1ks956Y9e8Cu7d5ywtZLVwIA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are very happy with out new roof by Busy Boys Roofing.

Highly recommend Busy Boys Roofing...you won't be disappointed...Thanks to all of you...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAXYNYWP2Wige0HtHVdf8ci&fid=0x0:0x593cb3c2a24977ac"],"When":"2025-6-13"},{"Name":"Darcey Nicholl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSF_w34jo_iTj8Hn3mclZMp5iW0hbjtAN7oai2342Cp5l-kTV_aQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We dealt with Mike and his crew, who was very friendly and professional. The house was already currently being lived in at this point.
We had agreed to help them get the stairs stained.  I had given them a price for the job but of course they counter offered $1,000 lower than my requested quote.  I did however accept the job.  I received my initial deposit to get the job started and completed.  However since our completion Dec  19th of 2019, we have still not received final payment. This company you can trust your business and any issues with your  roof. Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChh_f-wQE&fid=0x0:0x4aef9a794929fa4f"],"When":"2023-2-23"},{"Name":"Jack Nickel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQjnQqhYbFQvkIWYDWSt3S6XOnhEN1rko4qClcyw2nuquXvGx-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My roof was 24 years old and I knew that the cladding on my two chimney chases was in bad shape. I contacted several roofing companies but Michael at Spartan was the only one willing to do the whole job. Before making a final decision I spoke with an individual who had his roof replaced by Michael. He told me he was very happy with the work and the only problem he had was chasing Michael down to pay him. This individual also mentioned that Spartan had replaced a roof across the street and that the work had originally been contracted to Penfolds but that they had subcontracted the work to Spartan. I had also been talking to Penfolds but their quote was roughly 50% higher than Spartan's for the roof portion alone. Spartan was clearly the best choice.

I decided to go with the Landmark PRO shingles and I am glad I did. They are a heavier shingle as evidenced by the difficulty in cutting them. I was impressed with the work ethic of the crew. It was difficult to get them to take a break even though it was quite hot.

The main chimney chase was clad in channel cedar and was roughly 25 feet high. The original builder had not flashed the top of the chimney and when Michael pulled the bottom siding off it was clear that the base structure was totally rotted and that all the plywood and siding on two sides had to be replaced. He dove right in, fortified the structure and replaced the plywood and siding and ensured that it had proper flashing so the problem would not happen again. All of this was done by ladder from sloped ground - truly amazing!

I am very happy with the quality of work done and I have no reservation in recommending Michael and Spartan to my friends and family. I feel lucky to have found him.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJqsjfPw&fid=0x0:0x4aef9a794929fa4f"],"When":"2023-6-24"}]

Naturally we all wonder if they are by legit costumers writing those comments; are they being honest and accurate. I own a house in Hasting-Sunrise neibourhood in East Vancouver. The most important part of any house is without a doubt the roof. It protects your family and belonging from the ever changing west coast weather and it's because of that we should do our diligent work when choosing the right people that we are trusting to keep our home protected from mother nature's harsh elements. I called 3 different companies to get a quote and I quickly settled with this one. When I first met John and Paul, I immediately felt at ease with them; we went up on the roof and they inspected all areas (including the gutters) and they took proper measurements in order to provide an accurate quote and not just something pulled out of a hat. They'd explained me in detail what the work process was going to be and provided me with a timeline; they listed the types of materials they were using and offered solutions with different budget options. All of their work was conducted in a clean and respectful manner without impacting the environment around our garden. They cover and protected all the areas around the house that could have been impacted when removing the old roof. They also installed new venting outlets to improve the air circulation of the attic at no extra cost. When the roof-work was completed Paul was so kind to help me fixed a DIY project that I had done on my garage-roof at no extra cost. These 2 brothers get a 5-star review simply because they exceeded my expectations, they were budget friendly, honest and provided quality workmanship in a timely manner...and it comes with warranty.  Give these guys a chance, you won be sorry!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCLPYdZ1GZrbRINv9B0uL_\u0026fid=0x0:0xd529026b4fd25f5c"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Jason Margolis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFmR0BRtT6h8AtCyGuoZHyemFlPqWP5IjLOpINvBPrO61X9BRu=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We highly recommend Raise the Roof Roofing. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Manvi Arora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocInz9zdvpOSH6TaiWhtxFgyYRidvU5L-hiYmx-sJdH6GSu0yQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I won’t comment on the quality of their work because we never got to see it—no one showed up when they promised. We booked them to replace our entire roof due to severe leaking, and it was raining heavily every day. We were willing to pay the full amount the owner quoted. He told us he would do the work on the next dry day (Tuesday), and we confirmed the date with him multiple times via call and text to make sure someone would be home.
I took a day off work and woke up early, as he said the crew would arrive first thing in the morning and the job would take two days. But no one came. After waiting two hours, my husband started calling, and every call went straight to voicemail. The owner never called or texted back to explain why they didn’t show up.
We ended up suffering through another two weeks of rain and constant leaking because we were depending on them. We were already a bit skeptical after reading some other reviews, but we trusted the owner because we understand things can happen.
He may do good work, but this company is certainly not reliable. If they can’t show up before the work even starts, it’s hard to imagine what their after-sale service would be like. A big no from us","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Simranjeet kaur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsKlubzungvgap4WBkJNdjrBzP7KuAGXM6KOBFJG0IKts=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"“I had a great experience with Baaz Roofing Company. Accepting his word, I paid him in full. He has since never provided the warranty and all texts, phone calls and emails to him have been ignored. I managed to get through to him once by borrowing a phone with a number he didn’t recognize. Again he promised to send it following the call, but never did. The work done appears acceptable (no leaks yet 🤞), but have to question why he refuses to provide the warranty. Did he use a different product or did the application not meet the manufacturer’s spec??  His continued ghosting of calls and emails makes it obvious he also will not stand behind his workmanship if future problems arise. I do not recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gurveer singh Flora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXngYI58xKBsXdF6maayWyYc-Ctvy0JR44aCwyoEHRYv_h6fqMZw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent experience with the roofing company special thanks to the crew for  outstanding roof work","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Naim Rahimyar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsiBZDHs3ARCQfBVdP7Jafs0YOnN5moCktU_U0u20k8lvd4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Baaz Roofing was referred to my by my Refrigeration guy to do a commercial roof for me.  I contacted four different companies and had three quotations including Baaz Roofing.  The one quotation was way over than the others.  Before, deciding to give the job to Mr. Arsh from Baaz roofing, I did a google search and found out that some reviews were concerning.  I decided to  contact my Refrigeration guy. End result was a much cleaner look and peace of mind !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDFFFjYfHRwLmmT1_LelUNs&fid=0x0:0xc996be5b9b427cfd"],"When":"2026-2-16"},{"Name":"R G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLYnrpMRqfwG-wZXQYCJRAmzTxaAyQDMwIRfoVd1EdNuj9O_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had my roof replaced and worked with Kevin Lim from Penfolds Roofing, and I couldn’t be happier with the entire experience. From start to finish, Kevin was incredibly patient, helpful, and knowledgeable. He took the time to answer all my questions (and there were many!) and made what I expected to be a stressful project completely smooth.

Kevin’s professionalism, attention to detail, and friendly, approachable manner truly stand out - he’s one of those rare people who go above and beyond for their clients. He followed up regularly, ensured everything was on schedule, and promptly resolved any small issues that came up. Thanks to him, I felt confident and cared for every step of the way.

Penfolds Roofing as a company also impressed me. Their entire team was organized, efficient, and respectful of my home and property throughout the process. The quality of their workmanship shows in every detail, and it’s clear they take pride in their work. Communication was excellent from start to finish, and I always knew what to expect at each stage.

I’m absolutely thrilled with my new roof and the peace of mind that came with choosing Penfolds and working with Kevin. I won’t need another roof for many years, but I’ll be recommending Penfolds Roofing - and especially Kevin Lim - to anyone looking for exceptional service, quality, and professionalism.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniel Ouellet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIoyk121cvnI5I2ojll9G8rbOSM3-CAugRL4B3pyXeVGsCz7w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Penfolds sent a crew of 11 guys and the entire job was done in a day and a half. I really appreciated details like flashing screwed into the roof deck with self-sealing screws instead of just being nailed in.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPGRJILNAm_PzD_YLGOde5&fid=0x0:0xc996be5b9b427cfd"],"When":"2026-2-20"},{"Name":"Slow Mo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ37PM3g1TGzMAtF2LKOoMSy41FP_cEfFs4I2CytvTHIrvetQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sean and the crew at Penfolds were great to work with. They easily dealt with some curveballs we threw to them too. They removed our leaky (and now unused) chimneys above the roofline, giving the home a much cleaner look and installed snow guards.

Doug took time to work through a water egress issue that was not related to the roof installation - including helping me cut drywall open! - determined to find a solution the issue. Which we did.
We also required some more specialized carpentry work. Doug leveraged his own network to get us somebody to complete it.

It's not easy to find a company that that you can trust with such competitive pricing and such high quality craftsmanship on such a project. I feel fortunate to have worked with Doug, Rada and the team at Eco Exteriors.

Balbir was very honest and said our roof was still in good condition.  He had found some nails that had popped up and repaired. He had taken pics to show us. We highly recommend him.\nThanks Balbir","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anthony Leung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLR1vGhHoK2KLeCkTftFijzyXENnUBiKxQiSf4pJKMoOOPe-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Installed a roof without putting proper plywood overtop an existing shiplap contrary to BC roofing association guidelines. Nails were also plain roofing nails and were not 2” spiral. During hot / cold contraction expansion seasons, it will cause the nail to back out. The lack of a proper  3/4” plywood underlay installation overtop of the shiplap will void the warranty of the shingles as there isn’t a proper foundation for the nails to bite into if the existing shiplap is cracked or damaged. By the time the elderly homeowner was made aware, it was too late and done without proper notification or discussion with the elderly homeowner that they won’t be installing the plywood sheathing. Recommending any homeowner to do their due diligence and ask what type of materials they will use and the method they will be installing the roof. After discovering the improper installation technique, the company only offered a 15 year warranty which is rather on the low life expectancy of a newly shingled roof.  Upon completion,  the homeowner thought there was a couple shingles missing and when they contacted the roofing company owner to discuss the missing ridge vent shingles, he came over right away and was diligent and responsible enough to come over and to explain that they ran out of materials and were going to come install it the following next day. Upgrading the review to 2.5 stars as the roofing owner was responsive and was communicative at the end.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ashleigh Patterson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1pCmFi94vvuapZMKa2F6hBX9JYkXiEiYwOH00lzgFwW7WLg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"P B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0f4Kil1V-rOJQv676t4WTavWviLk295GmBkhnhn77R6bb_g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Shirley K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXHM0f-xQybh4zWzy2xEt40bOObOuPb43JeOntpiqqmzjmAw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We live in a condo building in Olympic Village with a roof top community garden. I just came from watering my plants 5 minutes ago and I was shocked at what I came to see. The cleaning equipment was left in people's gardening area and it seemed as though my tomato plant was knocked by the ?water hose and many of the tomatoes fell and one was stepped on. I feel a bit angry and upset that this happened in our community garden was somewhat disrespected by the crew who was scheduled to clean our building windows. I didn't see anyone yet this morning so I am assuming it may have been left like this over night.

I fixed my tomato cage this morning but it was a bit tilted as well. I had seen it two days ago and it was perfectly fine. I acknowledge I do not fully know what transpired but seeing what I saw this morning, I can't help but assume that this was from the cleaning company who has been here cleaning all sides of our building windows the past 1~2 weeks.

I understand it might be hard to navigate around the garden area with their equipment, butI feel like there are better areas where they could have at least put down the equipment after their work was complete besides on people's plants.

To be fair, they have not finished cleaning our windows yet so I don't have any reviews on their ability to get the cleaning job done. They started yesterday and there is still bird poop on my window, so I'm hoping they are coming back to our side.

UPDATE (SEP 12):
This is a week late update, but I received a personal letter of apology and some plant gifts from the company leadership (although I could not be home to receive it). The letter was handwritten, felt personal more than generic, and very professional. I was very much in shock, but also appreciative they took the time to stop by and bring us some things. They actually left some tomatoes, which was so thoughtful as it was my tomato plant I had mentioned in this post. The response I had received from their team was so amazing, quick, empathetic, kind, and thoughtful that I can actually say this is one of the best customer (?) experiences I have gone through. Huge thank you to the team and leadership at Alblaster for hearing my concerns and addressing them.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC6qMrDII9BzamO7oyOR_bN&fid=0x0:0x96ae4558098a04ff"],"When":"2025-8-29"},{"Name":"Garrison Stewart","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUBAY942VtN5hgL54gE1BY2Dlx0RzjsspNyomk0Iz1k3sINg6DN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had mike do my companies car wash, did such a great job. When he was finished before packing everything up he asked me to do a walk through with him in case there need to be more done or missing a spot, which there wasn't. We've used this company before and never had any issues. Thank you.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"agatha loukopoulos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQVGCNAKtNJpXMng2Cavy80VxhrmxbOlbUS7FSF4o2uBolZg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a fantastic experience with Alblaster for our recent power washing! They did an incredible job-our storefront and street looks spotless and refreshed. The team was extremely professional and took great care to avoid any damage during the cleaning process. A bit of water ended up leaking inside through the bottom of our main door, (no fault of theirs) they were quick to notice and immediately offered to clean it all up, which we really appreciated.
On top of everything, Milin even went above and beyond by cleaning our windows, which was a nice surprise! Highly recommend them if you're looking for quality work and excellent customer service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wanjiru Kabui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX4HNtK2xHzfU4spZpX704EqUVXAKS_s6DG32LkHQG7fgXKnCEWzg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I frequent Bill Curtis Square to decompress and journal....It was pleasant to see my fave spot getting power washed...I interacted briefly with Milin from Alblaster...who was very courteous and attentive of people sitting and walking by.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZUtlB-PsJEFUXrBk66clz&fid=0x0:0x96ae4558098a04ff"],"When":"2025-8-15"},{"Name":"Ersun “EZ” Celik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXP0-MrwRtzl6kifmo2TO_fcKxEQaEM3WermSst30pu3DFIQSy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We’ve been doing business with Alblaster Pressure Washing since 2018, and they’ve consistently delivered excellent service. The team is friendly, professional, and reliable. Especially Sam, he always takes the time to stop by before scheduling a job to provide an on site estimate and even suggests better options when available. Sam ensures the highest quality of work is done every time, and after the job is complete, he always checks in to make sure we’re happy with the results.

We truly appreciate Sam’s professionalism and dedication to customer satisfaction. If you’re looking for a dependable and high-quality pressure washing service, we highly recommend Alblaster!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dave McMillan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKkr9wiNSzt_bJTSWGCK1yZ_cae6WHX0PXG_aBI4fqsnM0xfg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very professional, very friendly!. They showed up on time, 3 fully equipped trucks to power wash our concrete 8 unit complex including 2 levels of parking and courtyard, plus 5 flights of stairs. Included in their work order were windows , which were all cleaned better than ever.  All residents were very pleased with the results!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lindsay Moir","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvnZ7u5VB0xFiiVcodTj3_U580e5rOaL9jyBdxVgESNd2tFKw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Alexz provided a competitive quote on our 2 storey office/warehouse. We chose Alblaster because they went out of their way to do the work based on our schedule requirements. The results were great and they went beyond what we expected. They take pride in their work and were a pleasure to deal with. Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICO3vKyxgE&fid=0x0:0x96ae4558098a04ff"],"When":"2022-6-11"},{"Name":"Rachel Seay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWnrPo09-wRSqHWb4gDts9lN4YLaItt7ifOj0P0YxsB5338s322=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot even put into words how amazing the crew was from Alblasters. As the president of our council, I had received a lot of quotes to do our building. From the efficiency of the quote process, to booking dates, to the job, it was outstanding. If I could give more ⭐️’s I would.

Our building hadn’t been done probably ever in 14 years, so I was worried that with the money spent, you wouldn’t see a huge change. Wow, was I wrong.

As soon as they started on the first side, I could not believe what I was seeing. It was amazing. Especially the soffits and edges

I was also impressed by their safety crew, their flag man, and the friendliness and professionalism of the crew.

But was impressed me the most was the retaining wall between the side of our building. I was like there is no way they are going to get that clean - yup, I was wrong.

If you are the person making the decision, you will probably be going through quotes and let me say now, don’t go for the cheapest, go for the quality of work. And their prices were reasonable too. They used hot water, a soak, and finished up with ever detail. I have also never seen the window look cleaner.

Thank you Josh, Alexz, California man and the crew for your diligent hard work, professionalism, and ease of the process.

Rachel Seay
Owner of Inner Fit Studios
Council President Eclipse Strata","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDH3NO8SQ&fid=0x0:0x96ae4558098a04ff"],"When":"2024-9-13"}]

However, last summer we were having an issue with the rollers on one of the doors due to all the rain and moisture it's exposed to on the North Shore and Brock and his team made sure it was fixed quickly and properly. It's nice to buy a quality product and even better when you can have confidence in the company behind the product. I recommend you give West Coast Windows a call if you're in the market.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James Robertson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzoROsjnkV6cJdLHBALU9AlaKAx0UcJ1Zd6NRpxeO-zPNHtQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"As a general contractor in the renovation and new build industry developing trust with a supplier is key to future endeavors and the growth of the relationship. To facilitate that the first couple of dealings are critical, unfortunately with West Coast Windows the initial interactions have not bern 100% positive.
Before I can award a large 20k+ supply contract to a sub-trade or supplier  we owe it to our costumers and clients to ensure they are being serviced by the best we can offer and as such we "test tge waters" of potential suppliers and make our assessments based on a smaller and simpler project. West Coast Windows was commissioned to merely supply 2 windows for a small kitchen reno. Because they project was a reno and we were replacing windows into existing openings I felt it was important the manufacturer come to site and measure the opening themselves to ensure they had all the info to produce the product that would fit. The rep from West Coast Windows literally said it wasn't worth his time for just 2 windows. Further, when asked to meet with my clients to discuss function/configuration and design questions it was suggested they look on line or drive the 45km to their showroom.  Very poor costumer service or care. The back and forth questions and answers via email through myself as apposed to a single visit from a rep delayed the selection process and consequently the project unnecessarily.  Product arrived late albeit as ordered and of appropriate quality.
We will not be using them again for any of our projects whether it be another 2 window kitchen reno or one of our major full home projects.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kent Harrison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLH7p6BhEtnzE2nTS38q_BZtRLqm8tuvzOw5_yr9Bxe2mZC8A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Replaced two patio sliding doors, one standard and one special order. Both doors arrived within the timeline provided. Great communication with the company. The install crew was actually a little earlier than scheduled, who immediately went to work removing and completing the install. Very professional crew. Finished doors and trim look fantastic. They cleaned up their work area and were finished in a little over four hours. I've used West Coast Windows in the pass and if needed, will use them again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"George Mart","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocILlY23fJjmd7QjfcWW9ORPJL_XKpocFIGe-5DLQmiIp5gI0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have just had West coast windows replace my son's windows after a very successful  full building replacement windows in our condos. The company is excellent in every way including pricing. The installation team are wonderful and very careful and obliging,.I would happily recommend them to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dante 1953","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJqWtTHSoma0inG11d2oDDIPOdA17V_MiRnATM9GoN9EuS5QQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had West Coast Windows update our old aluminum house windows (19 in total) and we have no hesitation in recommending their services. We got quotes from Centra and LongLife and West Coast was the most competitive and comfortable to deal with.  Quick and seamless installation and great after sales service.  Dante & Leslie North Vancouver","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sharel Longhurst","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8Vc06DHFYxH5FC02WRbpIWLgXW8Ukr6-q3X6ruFg6UEFlgLg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"These guys are by far the best company in the Lower Mainland for Windows. Competitive pricing all though there products are made of better materials then the others not the plastic stuff.

The service and support has honestly been unreal in a positive way and they do not flinch when it comes to standing behind there product. I bought somewhere around 45 windows from them and the one window i didn't replace that i bought from Centra a year prior is the only window giving me issues which i will be replacing soon with a West Coast Window. I can tell you from looking at my Centra window its worth it to pay a little more and get the better quality and more importantly the great service behind it as its quite the investment financially. Peace of mind is well worth it.

I wish other companies in other trades and services cared as much as West Coast about the quality and service they offer to there clients. Been an absolute pleasure and a great experience and recommend friends, family and people i meet through work to them which is something i rarely ever do but cant stand behind what they offer.","Images":null,"When":""}]
